case_title: GOLDEN BAY MECHANICAL CO., vs. PAUL HYUN SUK DO DBA CLUB CAIRO et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 06

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAUL HYUN SUK DO DBA CLUB CAIRO $8,635.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,351.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,483.62 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,469.62, COSTS PER COST BILL. MODIFIED JUDGMENT, INCLUDES THE TOTAL INTEREST AND: "TO DEEM PLTF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ADMIT- TED IS GRANTED; AND THE REQUEST FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AS TO THE ANSWER ON FILE IS GRANTED; AND THAT SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1000.00 SHALL ISSUE IN FAVOR OF PLTF AND COUNSEL.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF JUN-20-1997, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER DEFENDANT COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER PER COURT'S INSTRUCTION.
